---
title: HBV modeling
date: today
author: "[Andreas Handel](https://www.andreashandel.com)"
format: 
  revealjs:
    theme: default
    css: "./media/slide-styling.css"
    transition: none
    incremental: false
    cap-location: bottom
    embed-resources: true
    self-contained-math: true
    slide-number: true
    show-slide-number: all
    auto-stretch: true
    smaller: false
---

## HBV modeling

- Similar to other chronic viruses (HIV, HCV)
- [Reviewed here](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/31930181/)

## HBV models

![](./media/fig-1.jpg){fig-align="center"}


## Model parameter estimates

![](./media/goyal-et-al-hbv-modeling-table-1.png){fig-align="center"}

## Model parameter estimates

![](./media/goyal-et-al-hbv-modeling-table-3.png){fig-align="center"}


## Summary

HBV models have been used to estimate the impact of therapy/interventions, and to estimate biologically relevant quantities (e.g. lifespan of virus and infected cells).
